judge_reason: Description A describes general features of a typewritten letter (aged paper, torn edge, punch holes, stamps, annotations, distribution list), while Description B quotes specific verbatim text from a stamp ('COMMUNICATIONS SECTION', date 'JUL 22 1947 P.M.') and a decoded message that Description A does not mention at all, indicating the two descriptions are about different visual content or one is hallucinating specific details.
original_image_tags: A typewritten letter on aged, yellowed paper with a torn top edge and punch holes. The document contains several stamps, handwritten annotations in red and black ink, and a distribution list on the left margin.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned archival typewritten letter on yellowed paper, dated July 21, 1947, with handwritten red and black annotations, a purple FBI receipt stamp at lower left, and a pasted or overprinted typed quotation in the lower middle about “tired of human nonsense” and “atomic war.”*
